title: Amirthakadeswarar Temple
tagline: Amirthakadeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple (மேலக்கடம்பூர் அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (Sanskrit: Amruta: nectar Ghata: pot Iswara: God) is a Hindu temple located at Melakadambur in Cuddalo
overview.description: Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple (மேலக்கடம்பூர் அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (Sanskrit: Amruta: nectar Ghata: pot Iswara: God) is a Hindu temple located at Melakadambur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirukadambur. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Amirtha Kadeswarar.

topPlaces.name: Ayangudi, Cuddalore
topPlaces.description: Ayangudi is an Indian village located in Kattumannarkoil taluk in the Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 73 kilometres (45 mi) to the south of the district headquarters Cuddalore, 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Kattumannarkoil and 225 km from State capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple (ஓமாம்புலியூர் துயர்தீர்த்தநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Omapuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Umapuliyur.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kattumannarkoil Town Panchayat constituted in 1892.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil block
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 55 panchayat villages.Total area of Kattumannarkoil is 455 km2 including 406.38 km2 rural area and 48.74 km2 urban area.Kattumannarkoil has a population of 2,76,947 peoples.

topPlaces.name: Lalpet
topPlaces.description: Lalpet is a Panchayat town in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu. Lalpet is situated in lush green surrounding with water bodies.

topPlaces.name: Vangudi
topPlaces.description: Vangudi is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 235 km away from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Brihadisvara Temple, Gangaikonda Cholapuram
topPlaces.description: The Brihadisvara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva in Gangaikonda Cholapuram, Jayankondam, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Completed in 1035 CE by Rajendra Chola I as a part of his new capital, this Chola dynasty era temple is similar in design, and has a similar name, as the older 11th century, Brihadeeswarar Temple about 70 kilometres (43 mi) to the southwest in Thanjavur.

topPlaces.name: Gangaikonda Cholapuram
topPlaces.description: Gaṅgaikoṇḍa Chōḻapuram is a village located near to Jayankondam, Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It became the capital of the Chola dynasty in c.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Brihadisvara Temple, Gangaikonda Cholapuram & around

items.note: The Brihadisvara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva in Gangaikonda Cholapuram, Jayankondam, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Completed in 1035 CE by Rajendra Chola I as a part of his new capital, this Chola dynasty era temple is similar in design, and has a similar name, as the older 11th century, Brihadeeswarar Temple about 70 kilometres (43 mi) to the southwest in Thanjavur.
Gaṅgaikoṇḍa Chōḻapuram is a village located near to Jayankondam, Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It became the capital of the Chola dynasty in c.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Amirthakadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Amirthakadeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Amirthakadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Amirthakadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Amirthakadeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Amirthakadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Amirthakadeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Amirthakadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ayangudi, Cuddalore, Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple, Kattumannarkoil, Kattumannarkoil block, Lalpet.
